summary: Payment Gateway Integration Failure - Stripe webhook processing broken
description: The Stripe payment gateway integration is failing intermittently in production. Webhook events for payment_intent.succeeded and payment_intent.payment_failed are not being processed correctly, resulting in orders stuck in 'pending' state. Estimated revenue impact: ~$45K/hour during peak. Root cause suspected to be a recent deployment (v3.12.1) that changed the webhook signature validation logic. Rollback attempted but the database schema change in that release prevents clean rollback.

summary: User authentication timeout bug - sessions expiring prematurely
description: Users are being logged out after approximately 8 minutes of inactivity instead of the configured 30-minute session timeout. The issue was introduced after upgrading the Redis session store from v6.2 to v7.0. The TTL is being set correctly in Redis but the session middleware is not refreshing the TTL on activity. Affects approximately 12% of active users daily based on support ticket volume.

summary: Database migration for v2.0 schema - multi-tenant partitioning
description: Implement the v2.0 database schema migration to support multi-tenant data partitioning. This involves: (1) Adding tenant_id columns to 23 tables, (2) Creating partition functions and schemes, (3) Migrating existing data with zero-downtime using shadow table approach, (4) Updating all repository layer queries to include tenant context. Migration must be backward-compatible with v1.x API clients during the transition period. Estimated data volume: 2.3TB across affected tables.

summary: API rate limiting implementation - token bucket with Redis backend
description: Implement API rate limiting using a token bucket algorithm backed by Redis. Requirements: (1) Per-API-key rate limits configurable via admin dashboard, (2) Default tiers: Free=100req/min, Pro=1000req/min, Enterprise=10000req/min, (3) Return standard RFC 6585 429 responses with Retry-After header, (4) Include X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers, (5) Implement sliding window counter as fallback. Must handle distributed deployment across 4 API gateway nodes without race conditions.

summary: Frontend dashboard redesign - React component migration to design system v3
description: Redesign the main analytics dashboard to align with Design System v3. Scope includes: (1) Migrate 14 legacy class components to functional components with hooks, (2) Replace Chart.js with Recharts for consistency, (3) Implement new filter panel with saved views, (4) Add real-time data streaming via WebSocket, (5) Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Design specs finalized in Figma (link in confluence). Performance target: First Contentful Paint < 1.2s, Time to Interactive < 2.5s.

summary: CI/CD pipeline optimization - reduce build times from 22min to under 8min
description: Current CI/CD pipeline takes 22 minutes average for a full build+test+deploy cycle. Target is under 8 minutes. Action plan: (1) Implement build caching for Docker layers and npm modules, (2) Parallelize test suites across 4 runners using test splitting, (3) Replace full integration test suite with contract tests for non-critical paths, (4) Add incremental build support for monorepo packages, (5) Evaluate switching from Jenkins to GitHub Actions for better parallelism. Current pipeline YAML is 847 lines and needs refactoring.

summary: Security audit remediation - patch critical CVEs in dependencies
description: Security audit identified 3 critical CVEs and 7 high-severity vulnerabilities in production dependencies. Critical findings: (1) CVE-2026-31245 in log4j-core 2.17.0 - remote code execution, (2) CVE-2026-28901 in Spring Framework 5.3.x - authentication bypass, (3) CVE-2026-33102 in jackson-databind - deserialization gadget chain. Must patch all critical CVEs within 48 hours per security policy. Requires dependency upgrades, regression testing, and coordinated deployment across 6 microservices. CISO has escalated to VP level.

summary: Performance regression in search API - P95 latency increased 4x
description: Search API P95 latency has increased from 120ms to 480ms after the Elasticsearch cluster upgrade from 7.x to 8.x. Investigation shows: (1) New default scoring algorithm (BM25F) is more compute-intensive, (2) Shard allocation strategy changed, resulting in hot nodes, (3) Field data cache being evicted too aggressively. Customer complaints increasing - 3 enterprise accounts have opened support tickets. Need to tune ES cluster configuration, potentially add 2 data nodes, and optimize the most expensive query patterns (faceted search with nested aggregations).

summary: Documentation update for API v2 - OpenAPI spec and developer portal
description: Update all API documentation for the v2 release. Scope: (1) Rewrite OpenAPI 3.1 spec for 47 endpoints with request/response examples, (2) Update developer portal with migration guide from v1 to v2, (3) Add interactive API playground using Swagger UI, (4) Write changelog with breaking changes highlighted, (5) Create SDK code examples for Python, JavaScript, Go, and Java. Coordinate with DevRel team for blog post announcement. Target: documentation ready 1 week before v2 GA.

summary: Mobile push notification service setup - Firebase Cloud Messaging integration
description: Set up push notification infrastructure for the mobile app. Requirements: (1) Integrate Firebase Cloud Messaging for Android and APNs for iOS, (2) Build notification preference management API, (3) Implement notification templates with i18n support for 6 languages, (4) Create admin UI for broadcast notifications, (5) Set up delivery tracking and analytics pipeline, (6) Handle notification grouping and throttling to avoid user fatigue. Must support segmented targeting based on user cohorts and in-app behavior events.
